title: Protocol — LysoTracker® Red DND-99 Live-Cell Staining �26 HCS Analysis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ykpty","text":"Live-cell lysosomal staining with LysoTracker® Red DND-99 followed by high-content confocal imaging (Opera Phenix® Plus) and automated quantification in Harmony®/Columbus®.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"weceb","text":"- Acquire channels sequentially: DAPI (Hoechst) — 405 nm laser ~30% / 100 ms; 568 nm (LysoTracker) — ~70% / 100 ms.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"pgzlh","text":"- Avoid saturation; keep instrument settings consistent across plates.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ks8lz","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"zqwdq","text":"Analysis — Harmony®/Columbus®","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":33}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e3dv6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2ri4l","text":"- Find Nuclei on Hoechst channel (tune intensity/size to exclude debris/clumps).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"h0yde","text":"- Find Cytoplasm around each nucleus using 568 channel; apply intensity filter 200–100,000 a.u.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"gxklt","text":"- Find Spots in cytoplasm on 568 channel to detect LysoTracker®-positive puncta (tune size/intensity).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f4ltl","text":"- Compute total spots per cell: normalise spot counts by nuclei count in each field.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"hiilj","text":"- Export per-well spot-per-cell metrics for statistics.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"gicmr","text":"- Equilibrate plate and medium to 37°C and 5% CO₂.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lmfbu","text":"- Prepare LysoTracker® working solution: 60 nM in complete medium (fresh).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"t8ibm","text":"- Prepare Hoechst 33342 working solution: 1 µg/mL in medium.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"met9i","text":"Handle fluorescent dyes with care; protect from light. Follow institutional live-cell handling guidelines.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"19957","text":"- LysoTracker® Red DND-99 (Life Technologies®, Cat# L7528)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"l3ic1","text":"- Hoechst 33342 (ThermoFisher Scientific®, Cat# H3570)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wx98e","text":"- Complete culture medium; pre-warmed PBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"v8jiz","text":"- 96-well imaging plates (optical bottom)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"nlsqu","text":"- Opera Phenix® Plus HCS System (RRID:SCR_021100)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b3cmi","text":"- Harmony® High-Content Imaging \u000026 Analysis Software (RRID:SCR_018809)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add LysoTracker® Red working solution to wells (final 60 nM). Incubate 37°C for 50 min (protected from light).
During the final 10 min, add Hoechst 33342 to 1 µg/mL.
Gently wash once with pre-warmed PBS to remove unbound dye.
Acquire channels sequentially: DAPI (Hoechst) — 405 nm laser ~30% / 100 ms; 568 nm (LysoTracker) — ~70% / 100 ms.
Avoid saturation; keep instrument settings consistent across plates.
Find Nuclei on Hoechst channel (tune intensity/size to exclude debris/clumps).
Find Cytoplasm around each nucleus using 568 channel; apply intensity filter 200–100,000 a.u.
Find Spots in cytoplasm on 568 channel to detect LysoTracker®-positive puncta (tune size/intensity).
Compute total spots per cell: normalise spot counts by nuclei count in each field.
Export per-well spot-per-cell metrics for statistics.
Robust punctate 568-nm signal marking acidic organelles; per-cell spot counts enabling group comparisons.
Weak staining → verify dye concentration and incubation time; avoid over-washing.
High background → reduce exposure or dye concentration; ensure sequential acquisition.
creator: Sara Lucas
